pipeline.topic_brief: Topic: $DOGE Legacy Strength in Meme Supercycle. Thesis: As the original meme king, $DOGE is seeing renewed technical breakout talk and positioning as the ultimate beneficiary of the Trump meme-coin conference hype, keeping the entire legacy meme sector elevated. Target audience: DOGE army veterans, Elon/X ecosystem followers, long-term meme holders, and swing traders riding established narratives.
pipeline.thesis: As the original meme king, $DOGE is the ultimate beneficiary of Trump meme-coin conference hype and a meme supercycle, keeping the entire legacy meme sector elevated through renewed technical breakout momentum.
